message:
fix(rate-limit): Handle empty checks array in checkMultipleLimits

Prevent crash when checkMultipleLimits is called with an empty array.
The reduce() on an empty array would throw - now returns a default
"allow" result.

Also added documentation clarifying that all limiters are incremented
in parallel, which is intentional to track all attempts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
